description.value:
An unabridged version of Herodotus' famous Histories, including strange text beyond the known version. Written on papyrus scrolls in Greek, it describes lost cities in Arabia, the ancient civilization of the Izdonarii, and beings from the stars wielding unthinkable technologies. Could be a copy with expanded notes from an unnamed author, or research notes Herodotus found unfit to publish. The Izdonarii are actively hunting down and destroying every known copy and any human who might have absorbed its insights.

LanguageGreek
AuthorHerodotus or unknown author
Date440 B.C.
Sanity Loss1D6/1D10
Cthulhu Mythos+3/+10 percentiles
Occult+1/+4 percentiles
Mythos Rating36
Study (weeks)48

Spells Contained

  • Mind Transfer
  • Cloud Memory
  • Appear Human
  • Quell Suspicion
